title: To send Bulk meeting invitation in google calendar by importing meeting data through excel in monday.com board

posts.author: dhawlandra382 (Dhawlandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to send bulk meeting invitations to candidates by importing Excel files into Monday.com.

I tried this through the Google Calendar integration on monday.com . Below is the integration recipe.

But the problem is that I am only able to create event from monday.com board to my Google Calendar but not able to send that event to others calendar.

The ultimate goal is to create a meeting link when we import data to monday board like date and time of the meeting and mail of other persons to whom we want to invite on google calendar.

Note: Every row of monday.com have different date, time and emails because the client want to send bulk invitations on google calendar to different email ids with different date and time.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dhawlandra382 ,

We recently launched the app Google Calendar Sync - monday.com App Marketplace, which allows you to set formatted event descriptions from your monday board columns. Since date fields are mapped to columns, each of your item will correspond to different event in calendar. Also you can specify multiple people, email columns in invitees field to send invites to them in one go. It should fit your use case perfectly.
